Title: Title
become_1_desc: On Solfana, your voice becomes a true medium. Whether you tell stories, teach, motivate or inspire, you can publish audio content accessible to thousands of listeners, for free or as premium creations.
become_2_desc: Publish free content to build your community, receive donations, or create exclusive audio packs to sell. With Solfana, you choose how to monetize your work, while the platform takes care of distribution and visibility.
become_3_title: Access a platform built for creators
become_3_desc: Solfana is not just a podcast app. It is a structured platform with tools, clear rules, and opportunities for visibility for serious and committed creators.
